subcodes.first_line: O Baker of Divine Unity! We bear witness concerning thee that thou hast fulfilled thy covenant and discharged that which thou didst accept in the Realm of Eternity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا خباز الاحدیه نشهد فی حقک بانک وفیت بعهدک و ادیت بما قبلت فی ذر البقا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @consolation and comfort
